tasks.build:example: deno run -A source/Elm.js && (cd example && deno run -A ../source/Main.js 0.1.0 build)
tasks.watch:example: deno run -A source/Elm.js && (cd example && deno run -A ../source/Main.js 0.1.0 build --watch)
tasks.compile: deno run -A source/Elm.js optimize && deno compile --unstable-bundle --output build/elm-devtools source/Main.ts 1.0.0
